subcodes.first_line: O My Pen! Make mention of him who hath turned unto My horizon and set his face towards My countenance, when those upon earth turned away from Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلمی ان اذکر من اقبل الی افقی و توجه الی وجهی اذ اعرض عنی من علی الارض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
